_comment: Mock Jira ticket data aligned with the Project Phoenix and DivatKiraly email threads. Used for future Jira-first architecture (Concept B). Not used by the PoC email-analysis pipeline.

tickets.summary: Login page: minimum password length not defined in spec
tickets._note: Spawned from unanswered spec question. Currently OPEN with no update in 58 days.

tickets.summary: Google SSO scope clarification — client decision required
tickets.resolution: Removed from scope — client confirmed nice-to-have only

tickets._note: STALLED — no update in 42 days. Blocker for testing phase.

tickets.summary: CI/CD pre-commit hook: db:migrate fails for new developers
tickets.resolution: Documented fix: run create_test_db.sh before first commit

tickets.summary: [INCIDENT] Production login outage after deployment — env var misconfiguration
tickets.resolution: Fixed within 24 minutes — wrong DB_CONNECTION_STRING in prod deploy script
tickets.root_cause: No environment variable validation in CI/CD pipeline

tickets.summary: Add env var validation step to CI/CD deployment pipeline
tickets._note: Follow-up from PPX-105 incident. Unassigned and unplanned.

tickets.summary: Barion payment gateway: callback URL handling ambiguity (V2 API vs test endpoint)
tickets.blocker: No response from BA on spec clarification
tickets._note: Entire payment integration is blocked. Critical path. 15 days with no answer.

tickets.summary: [GDPR] Newsletter checkbox pre-checked by default — violation of Art. 7
tickets._note: Active GDPR violation. Fix in progress.

tickets.summary: SKU search: client requested search by item number — not in original spec
tickets._note: Untracked scope change. Client verbal request, not estimated.

tickets.summary: NEW badge on product listing: 'nice to have' requirement not in spec
[INCIDENT] Client cannot log in — production deployment env var error
tickets.resolution: Fixed wrong env var in deploy script. Downtime: 24 minutes.

tickets.summary: Payment gateway: API rate limiting behavior not specified — open risk
tickets._note: Open technical risk. Could cause failures under production load.

metadata.usage: Mock data for PoC demonstration. In production, replace with live Jira API calls using JIRA_API_TOKEN and JIRA_BASE_URL from .env
